case_title: UNIVERSITY OF SAN FRANCISCO vs. WEBSTER RICHARD V. et al

docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNIVERSITY OF SAN FRANCISCO
DECLARATION OF BENJAMIN K. TSUI RE: DEFAULT UNDER STIPULATION. FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNIVERSITY OF SAN FRANCISCO
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 685.050 INTEREST AMOUNT $34.44 FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNIVERSITY OF SAN FRANCISCO
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF NOV-02-1994, CONTINUED TO JAN-05-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 PLAINTIFF TO FILE DEFAULT JUDGMENT BY 12-29-94. APPEARANCE ON 11-2-94 NOT REQUIRED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UNIVERSITY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WEBSTER RICHARD V. $2,401.83 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $46.72 INTEREST, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,663.55 NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
